reviews.review_description: More epic greatness from B4T!!! I am a huge fan of their work. I feel it deserves 5 stars however I think it would be cooler if it was more of a " choose your own adventure" style app. 3 short replays is cool  but it would be so much better if you could change the course of the film with many different outcomes. But I am not rating this app on potential I am rating it on experience and either way it is fun as hell. Keep up the GREAT WORK.

developer_response.body: Great. We loved your feedback and this is what motivate us everyday! We are working on new experience, wait for more soon! Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description:
Another dimension of VR stories!
For the first time in years I really spend my time with the cost of a great mind blowing after third final! 
I had used a lot of exps in VR like this one and anyone has not as wonderful and shocking like Sanatorium.
Congratulations developers!!!

developer_response.body: I am so glad that you liked it! Thank you very much!

reviews.review_title: I really wanted to like it more
reviews.review_description: Compared to other horror games,  this just misses the mark.   While this has exceptional textures,  smoothness,  sounds, environment,  etc, there's very little feel and horror to it (at least for me).   No jump scares.   Glad i didn't pay full price.

developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback! Our main experience focus was on the storytelling, but maybe you're right, we can put more horror!

reviews.review_description: This is a good concept but the game is very short, the graphisme must be better and this game isn't scary. Please, this game have potential, work to uggrade graphisme and of course the scary. Sorry for my bad english but i'm french :).

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We will take in consideration what you said. Thank you again!

reviews.review_description:
Before I start I want to say that I didn't understand it. To me it was just randomly selected clips it just could be me but I do like my vr horror apps. I really can't see almost 5$ AUD in this, it looks ok but no where near to what they say. I was wanting my money back when I finished it but I'll let them have it and hope they make something alot better then this. It's good for a start but I was expecting alot more for what your asking for it soak the Wright up you gave it. It didn't make me jump once, I spent the hole time wondering what was going on. 

Really didn't like this app and I say to the people don't pay what there asking for it's to much for what your getting
